name: xiaomi-mimo
title: Xiaomi MiMo Usage
description: View Xiaomi MiMo model token usage and quota.
author: CaffeineCat

commands.name: view-mimo-usage
commands.title: View MiMo Usage
commands.subtitle: Xiaomi MiMo
commands.description: View Xiaomi MiMo model token usage and quota information.

commands.name: mimo-usage-menubar
commands.title: MiMo Usage in Menu Bar
commands.subtitle: Xiaomi MiMo
commands.description: Show Xiaomi MiMo token usage in the macOS menu bar.

commands.name: update-cookie
commands.title: Update Cookie
commands.subtitle: Xiaomi MiMo
commands.description: Update the Xiaomi MiMo platform cookie when authentication expires.

preferences.name: cookie
preferences.title: Cookie
preferences.description: Your Xiaomi MiMo platform cookie. Copy it from the browser DevTools (Network tab → any API request → Cookie header).

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
